original_title: GVH-112 Sex Appeal PA Chairman and Bad Boy Student Organization Sumire Mihara
overview: Sumire, the chairman of the proud Chiki PA, who has bought a grudge against the cunning student organization officers of the preparatory school. Even though he tried to resist, he became crazy with pleasure due to the evil wisdom of the evil kid and the attacks by multiple young Ji Po, and from a bullish attitude, he fell to the point where he blew the tide and begged for Ji Po. This time it's a real hit! Sumire Mihara's performance, which is a perfect match for the series' regular flashy costumes and make-up, is a must-see! !!
